rationale: Y directly verifies the exact rationale the ground-truth inline comment gives (both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts for diffusion, so already_submitted was never load-bearing) and lands on the correct APPROVE verdict matching both human reviewers. X touches the same lines but is internally contradictory — it 'validates' the same facts in its sweep notes, then re-flags them as unresolved 'major' concerns needing confirmation, inflating finding count with redundant asks on orchestrator.py:1290 and landing on REQUEST CHANGES despite finding no real blocker. X's actionable minor suggestions (assertion, comment) are reasonable but outweighed by the noisy/contradictory major flags that hurt precision and correctness of verdict.
